message:
fix(scanner): improve pattern confidence scores and predictive warning escalation

Reduce false-positive deletion risk by lowering cargo-prefix and cache/tmp
generic pattern confidence scores. Add severity-level tracking to predictive
pressure warnings with escalation on increasing risk. Include regression
test reproducer for dangerous patterns incorrectly flagging source modules
like src/cargo_utils and src/cache for deletion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
